The Face of the Sound

Meet DJ Dade

Born in the 305. Built for Saturdays. DJ Dade is the voice and face of Miami Hurricanes Anthem, bringing everything from classic Miami sound to stadium-shaking crunk.

Catch him from Ocean Drive to the tailgate lot, dropping anthems that turn a parking lot into a party and a third down into a riot.

When the flames go up and the crowd goes wild, that is our song playing.
Run With Us

Miami Hurricanes Anthem

Find Miami Hurricanes Anthem on every platform. New tracks, gameday drops, and DJ Dade behind the scenes. Tag us when the anthem hits at your tailgate.

Miami Hurricanes Anthem is an unofficial, independent fan project. This project is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by the University of Miami or its athletic programs. All university names, logos, and marks are the property of their respective owners. DJ Dade is a fictional AI-generated character. Music is original and AI-assisted, created by fans, for fans.
